title: GJEB (GammaJustExtremeBright)
description: This mod allows you to change your gamma value up to 1000% ingame. (FullBright)
body:
This mod allows you to change your gamma value up to 1000% ingame. ![Slider with 854% of Gamma Value](https://i.imgur.com/HLtghhE.png) This mod can be packed in every modpack you want.
[Sourcecode](https://github.com/MC-U-Team/GJEB-GammaJustExtremeBright) is linked above and is available under Apache License 2.0.
Report Bugs on github.
